record.field: Based on September 2025 block test workshops at Evergreen Dynamic Harvest Nigeria. Review after 3 to 6 months of production tracking using variance data.

{ "Rump": {"Rump Steak": 62, "Rump Roast": 24, "Rump Trim": 14}, "Topside": {"Topside Roast": 58, "Topside Steak": 28, "Topside Trim": 14}, "Silverside": {"Silverside Roast": 52, "Corned Beef Cut": 26, "Silverside Trim": 22}, "Shin (Hind)": {"Osso Buco": 44, "Stewing Shin": 40, "Shin Trim": 16}, "Knuckle": {"Knuckle Roast": 58, "Knuckle Trim": 42}, "Flank": {"Flank Steak": 48, "Flank Trim": 52}, "Tenderloin": {"Tenderloin Steak": 78, "Tenderloin Trim": 22}, "Eye of Round": {"Eye Round Roast": 72, "Eye Round Trim": 28}, "Chuck": {"Chuck Steak": 48, "Chuck Roast": 30, "Chuck Trim": 22}, "Brisket": {"Brisket Flat": 52, "Brisket Point": 30, "Brisket Trim": 18}, "Ribs": {"Ribeye Steak": 36, "Short Ribs": 34, "Rib Trim": 30}, "Loin": {"Sirloin Roast": 28, "T-Bone Steak": 26, "Sirloin Steak": 24, "Loin Trim": 22}, "Fore Shin": {"Fore Stewing": 50, "Fore Shin Trim": 50}, "Neck": {"Neck Stew": 55, "Neck Trim": 45}, "Shoulder Clod": {"Shoulder Roast": 58, "Shoulder Trim": 42} }

{ "Beef Sausages": {"inputs":[{"product":"Minced Meat","ratio":0.55}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Pork Fat","ratio":0.18,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Sausage Casing","ratio":0.08,"uom":"m"},{"item":"Spice Mix","ratio":0.09,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Rusk","ratio":0.05,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":93,"leadTimeHrs":4,"shelfLifeDays":5}, "Beef Boerewors": {"inputs":[{"product":"Boerewors Mix","ratio":0.60}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Pork Fat","ratio":0.15,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Sausage Casing","ratio":0.06,"uom":"m"},{"item":"Boerewors Spice","ratio":0.10,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Vinegar","ratio":0.04,"uom":"L"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":94,"leadTimeHrs":3,"shelfLifeDays":4}, "Marinated Rump Steak": {"inputs":[{"product":"Rump Steak","ratio":0.82}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Marinade","ratio":0.15,"uom":"L"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.03,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":95,"leadTimeHrs":24,"shelfLifeDays":5}, "Beef Meatballs": {"inputs":[{"product":"Minced Meat","ratio":0.60}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Breadcrumbs","ratio":0.15,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Onion Powder","ratio":0.05,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Egg Powder","ratio":0.08,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Seasoning","ratio":0.07,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":96,"leadTimeHrs":2,"shelfLifeDays":3}, "Beef Stir-Fry Pack": {"inputs":[{"product":"Diced Beef","ratio":0.75}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Stir-Fry Sauce","ratio":0.15,"uom":"L"},{"item":"Vegetables (Mixed)","ratio":0.05,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":98,"leadTimeHrs":1,"shelfLifeDays":2}, "Smoked Brisket": {"inputs":[{"product":"Brisket Flat","ratio":0.90}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Smoking Rub","ratio":0.05,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":65,"leadTimeHrs":48,"shelfLifeDays":10}, "Beef Burgers (6-pack)": {"inputs":[{"product":"Burger Patty Mix","ratio":0.68}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Breadcrumbs","ratio":0.14,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Seasoning","ratio":0.08,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Egg Powder","ratio":0.05,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":97,"leadTimeHrs":3,"shelfLifeDays":3}, "Seasoned Short Ribs": {"inputs":[{"product":"Short Ribs","ratio":0.88}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Spice Rub","ratio":0.08,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.04,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":96,"leadTimeHrs":12,"shelfLifeDays":4}, "Marinated Kebabs": {"inputs":[{"product":"Kebab Cubes","ratio":0.72}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Kebab Marinade","ratio":0.18,"uom":"L"},{"item":"Skewers","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":95,"leadTimeHrs":12,"shelfLifeDays":3}, "Corned Beef (Processed)":{"inputs":[{"product":"Corned Beef Cut","ratio":0.80}],"nonMeat":[{"item":"Brine Solution","ratio":0.12,"uom":"L"},{"item":"Curing Salt","ratio":0.03,"uom":"kg"},{"item":"Packaging","ratio":0.05,"uom":"pcs"}],"yieldPct":75,"leadTimeHrs":120,"shelfLifeDays":21} }

[ "Rump Trim","Topside Trim","Silverside Trim","Chuck Trim","Loin Trim", "Rib Trim","Brisket Trim","Shin Trim","Knuckle Trim","Flank Trim", "Fore Shin Trim","Tenderloin Trim","Eye Round Trim","Neck Trim", "Shoulder Trim","Fat/Trim (HQ)","Fat/Trim (FQ)" ]
